name: @object-ui/dev-server
description: In-repo ObjectStack backend used to debug @object-ui/console without depending on an external framework checkout. Powered by @objectstack/cli.

scripts.dev: objectstack build && AUTH_SECRET=${AUTH_SECRET:-dev-secret-do-not-use-in-prod-0123456789abcdef} OS_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=${OS_TRUSTED_ORIGINS:-http://localhost:*} OS_DISABLE_STUDIO=1 OS_DISABLE_CONSOLE=1 objectstack serve --port 3000
